name: Blake Taylor
headline: AI Product Builder · Customer Experience AI · Trust & Safety
summary: AI product builder and systems operator with experience shipping customer-facing AI products, workflow automations, guardrail systems, and production web and iOS tools. Founder of Koinophobia Labs, with a professional background in high-volume customer operations at DraftKings and a B.A. in Global Management. Strongest at translating real customer friction into structured products, approval workflows, escalation systems, and tested user experiences.

experience.title: Founder & Product Builder
bullets: Built and operate an independent AI product studio; designed and shipped four AI-powered products and their supporting web systems.
Own product strategy, roadmap planning, testing, documentation, deployment, and release cycles end to end.
Build AI workflows around human-in-the-loop approval gates rather than uncontrolled automation, with swappable Claude and OpenAI model adapters for generation and utility tasks.
Built operational dashboards, CRM workflows, lead intake, payments infrastructure, and internal tooling.

Run structured QA, adversarial testing, and production verification across web and iOS — including an 80-prompt adversarial evaluation with zero hard guardrail violations and 50+ documented development and iteration cycles.
Authored a Responsible Gaming community framework (CLEAR model) with escalation paths.

experience.title: Associate Sportsbook Writer
bullets: Operated in a high-volume retail environment serving hundreds of daily customers; served as a primary contact for complex product inquiries.
Managed live product questions, customer escalations, account and transaction concerns, and real-time problem resolution under pressure.
Translated product rules, policies, promotions, and operational procedures into clear customer guidance.

Balanced speed, accuracy, compliance, and customer experience in a regulated environment, recognizing situations requiring escalation and routing them through the appropriate support or responsible-gaming process.
Developed firsthand understanding of customer friction, product confusion, trust, and escalation design — experience now applied to AI product and workflow development.

projects.name: Trendi
projects.blurb: iOS creator execution product that turns rough ideas into recordable content. SwiftUI; shipped through TestFlight.

projects.name: You Know Ball
projects.blurb: Sports-debate game with deterministic gameplay, guardrails, scoring, and shareable outcomes; TestFlight + live web MVP.

projects.name: Career Forge
projects.blurb: Live Next.js/TypeScript résumé and job-search product.

projects.name: Koinophobia Labs systems
projects.blurb: Public product site with revenue audit, lead intake, CRM, outreach, Stripe infrastructure, and deploy workflows.
